message:
search/storage: harden limits, schema reads, and metadata fallbacks

search:

- return empty results on limit=0 to avoid unnecessary search work

- document error conditions on public APIs and mark doc_count as must_use

- simplify doc type handling and tighten test expectations

storage:

- treat missing schema table as version 0 without fallible Result

- guard LIMIT conversions via i64 helper to avoid overflow

- normalize timestamp parsing with map_or_else fallback

- clarify error docs and reduce clippy noise in schema setup
